backend/main.mo: Motoko actor for the Coal & Curry backend that manages reservations, newsletter subscribers, and reviews using Map/Set storage with sorting and validation logic.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three UI text-color update features (Reviews, Menu, Contact pages) to their affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's pages, components, and public assets.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, chart, sidebar variables).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA with a root div and a module script entry point loading src/main.tsx.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Robots.txt allowing all crawlers on all paths except /cart and /checkout, with a sitemap reference to coalandcurry.com.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing all 9 public routes of coalandcurry.com with lastmod dates, change frequencies, and priority values for SEO crawling.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with 11 routes, wraps the app in QueryClient/CartProvider, and renders the shared Layout (Navbar, Footer, FloatingReserveButton, ChatbotWidget).
frontend/src/components/chatbot/ChatbotP: Chat UI panel component that displays a scrollable message thread, quick-reply buttons, and a text input, using getBotResponse to generate bot replies.
frontend/src/components/chatbot/ChatbotW: Floating action button fixed to the bottom-right corner that toggles the ChatbotPanel open/closed with an animated transition.
frontend/src/components/gallery/Lightbox: A fullscreen image lightbox modal component with keyboard navigation (Escape, arrow keys) and prev/next buttons for cycling through an image array.
frontend/src/components/home/CustomerRev: A carousel-style testimonials section that displays three reviews at a time, fetching from a backend actor or falling back to static South Indian restaurant reviews.
frontend/src/components/home/HeroSection: The main hero section with a full-screen background image, restaurant branding, CTA buttons linking to the menu and reservation pages, and summary stats.
frontend/src/components/home/InstagramFe: A decorative Instagram feed grid section displaying six static food/gallery images with hover effects and a link to the restaurant's Instagram profile.
frontend/src/components/home/OffersGalle: A promotional section with a background image overlay showcasing three hardcoded limited-time offers (Lunch Combo, Family Feast, Weekend Grill Fest) and a link to the offers page.
frontend/src/components/home/SignatureDi: A grid section displaying four signature menu items filtered from menuData, with spice level indicators, veg/non-veg badges, and add-to-cart functionality.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingR: A fixed floating action button in the bottom-right corner that links to the reservation page.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: A multi-column site footer with brand info, social links, quick navigation links, menu categories, contact details, and a newsletter signup component.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navbar.ts: Responsive fixed navbar for Coal & Curry with scroll-aware styling, active link highlighting, cart item count badge, and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/layout/Newslette: Email newsletter subscription form that calls a mutation hook and displays success, duplicate, or error feedback states.
frontend/src/components/menu/DishCard.ts: Menu item card displaying dish image, veg/non-veg badge, signature tag, spice level, price, and an add/increment/decrement cart control.
frontend/src/components/menu/MenuTabs.ts: Sticky horizontal scrollable tab bar for filtering menu items by category, with an 'All Items' option prepended.
frontend/src/components/offers/Countdown: Live countdown timer component that ticks every second and displays days, hours, minutes, and seconds until a target date.
frontend/src/components/seo/SEOHead.tsx: Headless SEO component that imperatively sets document title, meta tags (description, robots, Open Graph, Twitter Card), canonical link, and JSON-LD schema via useEffect.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: Cart context with localStorage persistence that manages cart items (add, remove, update quantity, clear) and exposes totalItems and subtotal; price is parsed from a string field.
frontend/src/context/LanguageContext.tsx: Language context supporting English and Tamil toggling, with a typed translation lookup function covering all UI string keys.
frontend/src/contexts/CartContext.tsx: Alternative cart context (using MenuItem type with numeric price) with localStorage persistence, providing cartCount and cartTotal alongside standard cart operations.
frontend/src/data/menuData.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and exported data arrays for menu items and categories in a South Indian restaurant, including details like price, spice level, and dietary flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity state to the React component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including reviews, reservations, and newsletter subscriptions via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens including restaurant-specific color variables like saffron and turmeric.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page component for the Coal & Curry restaurant displaying the story, chef profiles, and hygiene certifications with SEO metadata.
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Renders the Coal & Curry blog page with a grid of six hardcoded blog post cards covering Chettinad food topics, each with category color badges, metadata, and SEO head tags.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Displays the shopping cart page with item list, quantity controls, remove buttons, and an order summary panel, using the CartContext for state and linking to checkout.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Multi-step checkout flow (order type → details → payment → confirmation) that reads cart state, simulates payment processing, clears the cart on success, and marks all pages noindex.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page showing restaurant address, phone, email, business hours, social links, a WhatsApp shortcut, and a simple client-side contact form with a submitted confirmation state.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: Gallery page organized into four themed sections (charcoal cooking, interiors, food photography, celebrations) with a click-to-open lightbox component supporting prev/next navigation.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: The Home page assembles the restaurant's landing page with a hero section, features strip, signature dishes, about teaser, customer reviews, and quick-info sections, along with JSON-LD structured data and SEO metadata for Coal & Curry.
frontend/src/pages/Loyalty.tsx: The Loyalty page displays the Coal & Curry rewards program, showing four loyalty tiers (Coal to Inferno), program benefits, and a phone-number enrollment form with basic validation.
frontend/src/pages/Menu.tsx: The Menu page renders a searchable, category-filtered grid of 50+ South Indian dishes using MenuTabs and DishCard components, with SEO metadata included.
frontend/src/pages/Offers.tsx: The Offers page displays six time-limited promotional deals (e.g., Lunch Combo, Family Feast, Birthday Package) in a card grid with countdown timers and a hero banner image.
frontend/src/pages/Reservation.tsx: The Reservation page provides a validated table-booking form (name, phone, date, time, guests, occasion, seating) that submits via a mutation hook and shows a confirmation screen on success.
frontend/src/utils/chatbotResponses.ts: Defines a static keyword-to-response map and a list of quick-reply labels used by the site's chatbot to answer common questions about the menu, hours, reservations, delivery, and more.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Coal & Curry frontend, extending the theme with custom colors (saffron, turmeric, deep-red, etc.), fonts (Playfair Display, Lato), border radii, box shadows, and animations including accordion and fade-in keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Coal & Curry multi-page app project, recording existing features, a known issue with font colors not being white on Review, Filter, and Contact pages, and a pending fix request (AR-1) to address that readability problem.
